assertions.text: Runs git status and git diff to scan changes
assertions.evidence: Step 0 inventories changes from git status; Step 2 runs 'git diff app/.env.example'

assertions.text: Runs ruff check and ruff format for Python lint
assertions.evidence: Step 3 runs 'make lint' which includes ruff check and format; also shows 'uv run ruff check app/ --fix'

assertions.text: Runs ty check for Python type checking
assertions.evidence: Step 3 lists 'ty check .' as part of 'make lint' suite

assertions.text: Runs pytest for unit and integration tests
assertions.evidence: Step 4 runs 'make test' which includes pytest unit + integration

assertions.text: Creates tasks to track pipeline phases
assertions.evidence: No TaskCreate calls mentioned. Steps tracked via walkthrough numbering only.

assertions.text: Checks for migration files in supabase/migrations/
assertions.evidence: Step 5 explicitly handles the migration file with 'supabase db push'

assertions.text: Attempts to create a git commit with structured message
assertions.evidence: Step 6 creates commit with conventional commit format and Co-Authored-By using HEREDOC

assertions.text: Attempts to create a PR using gh pr create
assertions.evidence: Step 8 uses 'gh pr create' with summary, migration notes, and test plan

assertions.text: Attempts deployment to Cloud Run and Vercel
assertions.evidence: Step 10 deploys to Cloud Run via 'make deploy'; Step 11 deploys to Vercel
